full_name: Cozy 1 Bedroom Apt with Pool & 3mins Walk to Beach

access.response: Address: Casse Ghoon Road, Pointe aux Canonniers, 30525 Grand Baie, Mauritius | Gate/Door Code: [redacted]| Lockbox Code: [redacted]

checkout.response: Please note that checkout is at 10:00am, unless otherwise agreed.  Before you head out, kindly: Turn off all ACs and lights Close all windows and doors Leave the keys in the lockbox and scramble the code  If you have any questions, feel free to reach out at any time.

parking.response: Where to park the car: Each apartment has its own secure parking space inside the premises.  Access: To enter the parking area, please use the gate code 1368#.  Street parking: Allowed, but not recommended.

emergency.response: 🚨 URGENT: Call +2304084119 immediately | Available 24/7 | We're here to help!

property_details.address: Casse Ghoon Road, Pointe aux Canonniers, 30525 Grand Baie, Mauritius
property_details.description: Delight in an unforgettable culinary journey, where Chef Lou prepares refined, exclusive dishes using fresh, local ingredients, a signature experience of your stay. To enjoy this unique dining, simply check with the chef upon arrival. After indulging in gourmet cuisine, relax in your cosy 1-bedroom apartment with a private bathroom, shared pool, and serene terrace.
property_details.space:
Inside, you’ll find a welcoming bedroom with its own ensuite bathroom, offering privacy and comfort. The rustic-style living area includes a cosy outdoor TV lounge and a bright dining space, perfect for relaxing, sharing moments, or enjoying a meal. The fully equipped kitchen allows you to prepare your own dishes if you wish, or you can delight in a personalised culinary experience with Chef Lou, crafted to your preferences.

Your private terrace opens to a peaceful outdoor space ideal for morning coffee or evening drinks. Just a few steps away, enjoy the shared swimming pool surrounded by lush greenery, creating a tranquil escape. Air conditioning, high-speed Wi-Fi, and free on-site parking ensure a comfortable and effortless stay.
property_details.parking:
Where to park the car:
Each apartment has its own secure parking space inside the premises.

Access:
To enter the parking area, please use the gate code 1368#.

Street parking:
Allowed, but not recommended.
property_details.guest_access:
Guests have full private access to the apartment and its terrace. You’ll also enjoy shared access to the residence’s swimming pool and garden area.
For a unique dining experience, the on-site restaurant can prepare meals on request, exclusively for guests. Simply check with the staff during your stay to arrange a menu with the chef.

The pool area is shared with a few other apartments, but the atmosphere remains peaceful and respectful. Private parking is available on site, and our team is always nearby to assist or share local recommendations.
